'''dhajuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kybp|kybp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kybp|kybp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhajuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjihith|dhæjihith]] || [[word:dhæjihij|dhæjihij]] || [[word:dhæjihish|dhæjihish]] || [[word:dhæjihi|dhæjihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajujuhuth|dhajujuhuth]] || [[word:dhajujuhuj|dhajujuhuj]] || [[word:dhajujuhush|dhajujuhush]] || [[word:dhajujuhu|dhajujuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajuhuth|dhajuhuth]] || [[word:dhajuhuj|dhajuhuj]] || [[word:dhajuhush|dhajuhush]] || [[word:dhajuhu|dhajuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajufhuth|dhajufhuth]] || [[word:dhajufhuj|dhajufhuj]] || [[word:dhajufhush|dhajufhush]] || [[word:dhajufhuf|dhajufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajuhuthu|dhajuhuthu]] || [[word:dhajuhuju|dhajuhuju]] || [[word:dhajuhushu|dhajuhushu]] || [[word:dhajuhuku|dhajuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajuhuth|dhajuhuth]] || [[word:dhajuhuj|dhajuhuj]] || [[word:dhajuhush|dhajuhush]] || [[word:dhajuhu|dhajuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajuhuthul|dhajuhuthul]] || [[word:dhajuhujul|dhajuhujul]] || [[word:dhajuhushul|dhajuhushul]] || [[word:dhajuhukul|dhajuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajuhuthuthu|dhajuhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhajuhujuju|dhajuhujuju]] || [[word:dhajuhushushu|dhajuhushushu]] || [[word:dhajuhuku|dhajuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajuhuthun|dhajuhuthun]] || [[word:dhajuhujun|dhajuhujun]] || [[word:dhajuhushun|dhajuhushun]] || [[word:dhajuhukun|dhajuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajuhuthuoro|dhajuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhajuhujuoro|dhajuhujuoro]] || [[word:dhajuhushuoro|dhajuhushuoro]] || [[word:dhajuhukuoro|dhajuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
